title: X-Wing series (disambiguation)
content:
There were a number of series entitled the '''X-Wing series''':
*The [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''X-Wing'']] series of novels, by [[Michael A. Stackpole]] and [[Aaron Allston]].
*The [[X-Wing (game series)|''X-Wing'']] series of flight simulator games, released from [[1993]] to [[1999]].
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'', a series of thirty-five [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]].
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing: Rogue Leader]]'', a series of three comic books.
{{Disambig}}
